info.name: TurfIn Backend API
info.description: API collection for the TurfIn Backend Monolith. Built with NestJS and Drizzle ORM.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Public authentication flows plus authenticated token revocation. Use these requests to create accounts, sign in, rotate JWTs, and sign out.

body.raw:
{
  "email": "user@example.com", // [MANDATORY]
  "password": "string", // [MANDATORY]
  "role": "[string = UserRole.END_USER]", // [OPTIONAL]
  "firstName": "string", // [OPTIONAL]
  "middleName": "string", // [OPTIONAL]
  "lastName": "string", // [OPTIONAL]
  "displayName": "string", // [OPTIONAL]
  "avatarUrl": "string", // [OPTIONAL]
  "dateOfBirth": "string", // [OPTIONAL]
  "gender": "male", // [OPTIONAL] Allowed: male, female, other, prefer_not_to_say
  "city": "string", // [OPTIONAL]
  "state": "string", // [OPTIONAL]
  "preferredSports": ["football"], // [OPTIONAL] Allowed: football, cricket, tennis, badminton, basketball, hockey, volleyball, kabaddi, box_cricket, futsal, pickleball, throwball, netball, handball, dodgeball
  "vendorProfile": "[CreateVendorDto]" // [OPTIONAL]
}

request.description:
### Expected Response: AuthResponseDto

| Property | Type | Description |
|----------|------|-------------|
| accessToken | string | - |
| refreshToken | string | - |
| id | string | - |
| email | string | - |
| roles | string[] | - |
| permissions | string[] | - |
| profileCompleted | boolean | - |

body.raw:
{
  "email": "user@example.com", // [MANDATORY]
  "password": "string", // [MANDATORY]
  "role": "[string = UserRole.END_USER]", // [OPTIONAL]
  "firstName": "string", // [OPTIONAL]
  "middleName": "string", // [OPTIONAL]
  "lastName": "string", // [OPTIONAL]
  "displayName": "string", // [OPTIONAL]

  "vendorProfile": "[CreateVendorDto]" // [OPTIONAL]
}

request.description:
### Expected Response: AuthResponseDto

| Property | Type | Description |
|----------|------|-------------|
| accessToken | string | - |
| refreshToken | string | - |
| id | string | - |
| email | string | - |
| roles | string[] | - |
| permissions | string[] | - |
| profileCompleted | boolean | - |

| Property | Type | Description |

| refreshToken | string | - |
| id | string | - |
| email | string | - |
| roles | string[] | - |

| Property | Type | Description |

| id | string | - |
| email | string | - |
| roles | string[] | - |

Revoke refresh token (logout).

item.name: Audit
item.description: System-wide audit logging endpoints for administrators.

query.description: Filter by category: auth, kyc, booking, payment, slot, admin, vendor, turf, user
Filter by specific audit action: AUTH_LOGIN, AUTH_SIGNUP, TURF_CREATE, USER_ADDRESS_ADD, etc.

request.description: List all system audit logs with pagination and optional filters. Requires super_admin role.

query.description: Filter by category for export: auth, kyc, booking, payment, slot, admin, vendor, turf, user

request.description: Export all filtered audit logs to a CSV file. Uses streaming to handle large datasets.

item.name: Admin
item.description: Super admin delegated operations. These endpoints act on explicit vendor or turf identifiers and should never rely on the currently signed-in vendor context.

item.name: Users
item.description: User profile management and account statuses.

query.description: Filter by status: active, inactive, banned, under_review

request.description: List end-user profiles with pagination metadata. Requires a super_admin bearer token.
Fetch a specific user profile by its ID. Moved from /users/:id to /admin/users/:userId.
Ban a user and cancel all active bookings.
Unban a user account.

item.name: Vendors
item.description: Vendor profile management, onboarding, and lifecycle.

query.description: Filter by status: active, pending, suspended, banned

request.description: List vendor profiles with pagination metadata. Includes KYC details. Requires a super_admin bearer token.
Fetch a specific vendor profile by its ID. Requires a super_admin bearer token.

body.raw:
{
    "businessName": "Premier Sports Admin Edit",
    "phone": "+919999999999", // optional
    "whatsapp": "+919999999999", // optional
    "gstNumber": "22DDDDD0000D1Z8", // optional
    "payoutCycle": "monthly" // optional: daily | weekly | monthly
}

request.description: Delegated update of a specific vendor profile by an administrator. Acts on an explicit vendorId.
Ban a vendor and disable their login identity.
Unban a vendor and restore their identity to active status.
Soft-delete a vendor profile. This sets the deletedAt timestamp and marked the vendor as inactive.

### Expected Response: VendorResponseDto

| Property | Type | Description |
|----------|------|-------------|
| id | string | - |
| identityId | string | - |
| businessName | string | - |
| businessType | BusinessType | - |
| ownerFullName | string | - |
| address | VendorAddressDto | - |
| bankingDetails | VendorBankingDetailsDto | - |
| commissionPct | string | - |
| payoutCycle | PayoutCycle | - |
| email | string | - |
| phone | string | - |
| whatsapp | string | - |
| gstNumber | string | - |
| businessRegistrationNumber | string | - |
| status | VendorStatus | - |
| kyc | KycResponseDto | - |
| createdAt | Date | - |
| updatedAt | Date | - |

body.raw:
{
  "name": "string", // [MANDATORY]
  "sports": ["football"], // [MANDATORY] Allowed: football, cricket, tennis, badminton, basketball, hockey, volleyball, kabaddi, box_cricket, futsal, pickleball, throwball, netball, handball, dodgeball
  "amenities": ["parking"], // [OPTIONAL] Allowed: parking, flood_lights, washrooms, changing_rooms, showers, drinking_water, cafeteria, equipment_rental, first_aid, wifi, cctv, power_backup, locker_facility, seating_area, practice_nets, scoreboard, warm_up_area, music_system, coaching, referee, covered_turf, indoor_facility, outdoor_facility, bibs_available, prayer_room
  "capacity": 100, // [OPTIONAL]
  "sizeFormat": "string", // [OPTIONAL]
  "surfaceType": "artificial_turf", // [MANDATORY] Allowed: artificial_turf, natural_grass, concrete, wooden, synthetic
  "address": "[TurfAddressDto]", // [MANDATORY]
  "weekdayOpen": "string", // [MANDATORY]
  "weekdayClose": "string", // [MANDATORY]
  "weekendOpen": "string", // [MANDATORY]
  "weekendClose": "string", // [MANDATORY]
  "standardPricePaise": 100, // [MANDATORY]
  "cancellationWindowHrs": 100 // [OPTIONAL]
}

request.description:
### Expected Response: TurfResponseDto

| Property | Type | Description |
|----------|------|-------------|
| id | string | - |
| vendorId | string | - |
| name | string | - |
| sports | SportType[] | - |
| amenities | AmenityType[] | - |
| capacity | number | null | - |
| sizeFormat | string | null | - |
| surfaceType | SurfaceType | - |
| address | TurfAddressDto | - |
| weekdayOpen | string | - |
| weekdayClose | string | - |
| weekendOpen | string | - |
| weekendClose | string | - |
| standardPricePaise | number | - |
| cancellationWindowHrs | number | - |
| status | TurfStatus | - |
| vendorBusinessName | string | - |
| vendorPhone | string | - |
| vendorWhatsapp | string | - |
| turfPhotos | string[] | - |
| kyc | TurfDocumentsResponseDto | - |
| createdAt | Date | - |
| updatedAt | Date | - |
Legacy-compatible alias for creating an arena for a vendor from the admin controller.
Legacy-compatible alias for listing a vendor's arenas from the admin controller.
Suspend a vendor account without banning it.
Restore a suspended vendor account to active operations.

item.name: Turfs
item.description: Turf turf management and status overrides.

query.description: Filter by status: active, inactive, pending, maintenance, suspended, banned

request.description: List all turf profiles across all vendors with pagination metadata. Includes vendor contact details and turf photos. Requires a super_admin bearer token.
Fetch any turf by id through the admin delegated route. Includes vendor contact details and turf photos. This bypasses vendor self-scope and is intended for backoffice tooling.
Ban a turf turf from administrative side.
Unban a turf turf.

| capacity | number | null | - |
| sizeFormat | string | null | - |
| surfaceType | SurfaceType | - |
| address | TurfAddressDto | - |
| weekdayOpen | string | - |
| weekdayClose | string | - |
| weekendOpen | string | - |
| weekendClose | string | - |
| standardPricePaise | number | - |
| cancellationWindowHrs | number | - |
| status | TurfStatus | - |
| vendorBusinessName | string | - |
| vendorPhone | string | - |
| vendorWhatsapp | string | - |
| turfPhotos | string[] | - |
| kyc | TurfDocumentsResponseDto | - |
| createdAt | Date | - |
| updatedAt | Date | - |
Update a turf profile from the admin surface.

item.name: Sub-Admins
item.description: Delegated sub-admin account overrides.

request.description: Directly update a sub-admin password using admin override permissions. Only works if target user is a sub-admin.

item.name: Slots
item.description: Admin delegated slot management and configuration.

request.description: List slots for any turf with admin-level details (hold status, price overrides).
Fetch detailed slot config including pricing grid for any turf.
Lists all arenas in the system with pagination and filters.
Creates an arena for a specific vendor. vendorId is provided in the body.
List all arenas for a specific vendor using the arenas controller path.
Update mutable arena profile fields.
Upload or replace arena KYC document metadata.
Ban an arena.
Unban an arena.

item.name: Users
item.description: Authenticated end-user profile operations. These routes operate on the signed-in identity, except the explicit admin-only lookup by user id.

request.description:
### Expected Response: UserResponseDto

| Property | Type | Description |
|----------|------|-------------|
| id | string | - |
| identityId | string | - |
| email | string | - |
| firstName | string | - |
| middleName | string | null | - |
| lastName | string | - |
| displayName | string | - |
| avatarUrl | string | null | - |
| dateOfBirth | string | null | - |
| gender | GenderType | null | - |
| city | string | null | - |
| state | string | null | - |
| country | string | - |
| preferredSports | SportType[] | - |
| addresses | UserAddressDto[] | - |
| favouriteTurfs | Record<string, boolean> | - |
| ownReferralCode | string | null | - |
| pushNotificationsEnabled | boolean | - |
| status | UserStatus | - |
| lastActiveAt | string | null | - |
| createdAt | string | - |

{
  "firstName": "string", // [OPTIONAL]
  "middleName": "string", // [OPTIONAL]
  "lastName": "string", // [OPTIONAL]
  "displayName": "string", // [OPTIONAL]
  "avatarUrl": "string", // [OPTIONAL]
  "dateOfBirth": "string", // [OPTIONAL]
  "gender": "male", // [OPTIONAL] Allowed: male, female, other, prefer_not_to_say

  "state": "string", // [OPTIONAL]
  "country": "string", // [OPTIONAL]
  "preferredSports": ["football"], // [OPTIONAL] Allowed: football, cricket, tennis, badminton, basketball, hockey, volleyball, kabaddi, box_cricket, futsal, pickleball, throwball, netball, handball, dodgeball
  "deviceOs": "ios", // [OPTIONAL] Allowed: ios, android, web
  "appVersion": "string", // [OPTIONAL]
  "pushNotificationsEnabled": true, // [OPTIONAL]

}

Soft-delete current user's account.
Add a new address to the user's profile.
Update specific turfs of an existing address.
Set the specified address as the primary one (index 0 swap).
Delete a specific address from the user's profile.

item.description: Public turf discovery for users.

request.description: Search for available turfs. Returns vendor contact details and turf photos.
Fetch expanded details of a specific turf turf. Includes vendor business name, phone, WhatsApp and turf photos.

item.description: Save and remove turfs from the user's favourites list.

request.description: Add a turf to the user's favourites list. This is an idempotent operation.
Remove a turf from the user's favourites list.

item.description: Public slot discovery for users.

item.name: Slots
item.description: Vendor self-service slot management.

item.name: Storage
item.description: Secure document storage operations. Generates short-lived signed URLs for uploads and views.

request.description: Generate a short-lived signed URL for uploading a file to a specific path.
Generate a short-lived signed URL for viewing a private file.

item.name: Sub-Admin Management
item.description: RBAC management endpoints for creating sub-admins, managing custom roles, and assigning granular resource:action permissions.

request.description: List all identities with the 'sub_admin' role and their assigned custom roles.
Permanently decommission a sub-admin. Revokes roles and deletes from Auth.
List all custom (non-system) roles and their granular permissions.
Fetch the catalogue of all granular resource:action permissions defined in the system.
Get roles assigned to a specific sub-admin.
Permanently delete a custom role.

item.name: Health
item.description: Public operational health endpoints for backend and database availability checks.

request.description: Basic server health check.
Check database connectivity health.

item.name: Reviews
item.description: Operations for turf ratings and reviews across different actor scopes.

request.description:
### Expected Response: ReviewResponseDto[]

| Property | Type | Description |
|----------|------|-------------|
| id | string | Unique review identifier |
| userId | string | ID of the user who wrote the review |
| turfId | string | ID of the turf being reviewed |
| bookingId | string | Linked verified booking ID |
| score | number | Rating score (0-5, one decimal point) |
| comment | string | User's feedback text (optional) |
| user | ReviewUserDto | Basic profile info of the reviewer |
| createdAt | Date | Relationship creation timestamp |

### Expected Response: ReviewResponseDto

Submit a rating and review for a completed booking. Re-calculates turf total rating atomically.

| Property | Type | Description |
|----------|------|-------------|
| id | string | Unique review identifier |
| userId | string | ID of the user who wrote the review |
| turfId | string | ID of the turf being reviewed |
| bookingId | string | Linked verified booking ID |
| score | number | Rating score (0-5, one decimal point) |
| comment | string | User's feedback text (optional) |
| createdAt | Date | Relationship creation timestamp |

### Expected Response: ReviewResponseDto[]

Fetch reviews for a turf owned by the authenticated vendor.

| Property | Type | Description |
|----------|------|-------------|
| id | string | Unique review identifier |
| userId | string | Reviewer ID |
| turfId | string | Turf ID |
| score | number | 0.0-5.0 |
| comment | string | Feedback |
| createdAt | Date | Timestamp |

### Expected Response: ReviewResponseDto[]

Global access to reviews for any turf.

| Property | Type | Description |
|----------|------|-------------|
| id | string | Unique review identifier |
| userId | string | Reviewer ID |
| turfId | string | Turf ID |
| score | number | 0.0-5.0 |
| comment | string | Feedback |
| createdAt | Date | Timestamp |
Delete a review using the canonical turf-scoped admin route.

item.name: Support
item.description: Customer-facing support ticket endpoints. Requires a valid user JWT (Bearer {{accessToken}}).

request.description: Create a new support ticket. category must be one of: booking, payment, account, technical, general.

### Expected Response: PaginatedResponseDto<TicketResponseDto>

Return all tickets raised by the authenticated user. Supports pagination (`?page=1&limit=10`) and filtering (`?status=open&category=booking&search=query`).

| Property | Type | Description |
|----------|------|-------------|
| data | TicketResponseDto[] | Array of tickets |
| meta | PaginationMeta | Pagination metadata (total, page, limit) |
Return a single ticket. Returns 403 if the ticket belongs to another user.
Return the full message thread for a ticket the caller owns (chronological order).
Customer adds a reply to their own ticket. Returns 403 if the ticket is closed.

item.name: Support (Admin)
item.description: Admin/agent support endpoints. Requires super_admin or system_admin role.

request.description:
### Expected Response: PaginatedResponseDto<TicketResponseDto>

Return ALL support tickets across all users. Admin only. Supports pagination (`?page=1&limit=10`) and filtering (`?status=open&category=booking&search=query`).

| Property | Type | Description |
|----------|------|-------------|
| data | TicketResponseDto[] | Array of tickets |
| meta | PaginationMeta | Pagination metadata (total, page, limit) |
Return a single ticket by ID — no ownership restriction.
Return the full message thread for any ticket — no ownership check.

### Expected Response: TicketMessageResponseDto

Agent sends a reply stored with sender_role = 'agent'. Returns 403 if ticket is closed.

| Property | Type | Description |
|----------|------|-------------|
| id | string | Unique message ID |
| ticketId | string | ID of the ticket |
| senderRole | string | 'user' or 'agent' |
| body | string | Content of the reply |
| createdAt | Date | Timestamp |
Change ticket status. Allowed values: open, in_progress, resolved, closed.

variable.description: UUID of the support ticket under test
